title: Proposed revocation of the A303 Amesbury to Berwick Down Development Consent Order 2023
body: "The Secretary of State for Transport proposes to revoke The A303 (Amesbury to Berwick Down) Development Consent Order 2023.  See the Planning Inspectorate for information about the scheme.  You can make representations to the Secretary of State for Transport on the revoking of the development consent order (DCO).  Quote reference ‘A303 Stonehenge DCO’ and:  Email: transportinfrastructure@dft.gov.uk  or write to:   Department for TransportGreat Minster House33 Horseferry RoadLondon, SW1P 4DR   If you have difficulty in submitting a representation, contact the Department for Transport on: 0300 330 3000.  "
